name: Main Entrance North Gate
description: Massive coral gates mark the northern entrance to the Silvered Market. Tidewarden banners drift between elegant marble pillars while citizens, merchants, cargo beasts, and city guards move through the area.
purpose: Primary patrol route into the market district.

name: Central Plaza
description: The heart of the Silvered Market, a vast circular plaza paved with polished blue stone where citizens gather beneath drifting lanterns and merchants advertise their goods.
purpose: Most market encounters eventually lead back here. Nella is often found nearby.

name: Statue of the Deep Accord
description: A towering statue depicting the legendary founders of Atlantis. Coral and pearl adorn its base while fish weave between carved tridents and ancient inscriptions.
purpose: Citizens frequently leave offerings here. Brother Neros occasionally gives public sermons nearby.

name: General Goods Stalls
description: Rows of colorful stalls selling clothing, tools, preserved food, maps, books, and curiosities.

name: Exotic Goods Bazaar
description: A louder bargaining district filled with rare goods from distant regions, including coral carvings, deep-sea relics, imported jewelry, enchanted trinkets, and mysterious curiosities.

name: Food and Spice Market
description: A fragrant market area filled with roasted reef fish, sea-spice stew, fresh kelp bread, and exotic seasonings.

name: Artisan's Row
description: A busy crafting area filled with hammering metal, carving tools, enchanted looms, and alchemical equipment.

name: Black Market Alley
description: Narrow passageways twist between aging storefronts and dimly lit alcoves. The area is technically legal. Mostly.
dmSecret: The recruits are instructed not to enter this district unless necessary. Future chapters make heavy use of this location.

name: Information Kiosk
description: A circular coral structure covered in notices, advertisements, missing property reports, and community announcements.
dmSecret: The missing child notice appears here during Session 2.

name: Gathering Steps
description: Wide marble steps descend into an open public meeting area where speeches, celebrations, festivals, and community announcements are regularly held.

name: Algae Lantern Garden
description: A peaceful corner of the market illuminated by glowing blue and violet algae where citizens gather to relax away from the crowds.
dmSecret: Nella occasionally feeds fish here. This is an excellent location for quieter roleplay scenes.

name: Merchant Guild Hall
description: A magnificent domed structure where trade representatives negotiate contracts, regulate commerce, and settle disputes.
dmSecret: Important later in the conspiracy storyline.

name: The Gilded Kelp
description: Atlantis' most popular tavern, filled with warm lantern light, laughter, music, and questionable decisions.

name: West Gate
description: A secondary market exit used by citizens traveling toward residential districts.

name: East Gate
description: A secondary market exit leading toward the dock districts and deeper portions of Atlantis.
